chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1151 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025 Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General. Mr. Gulzar Ali Malan, Assistant Prosecutor General along with Azizullah, Deputy Superintendent C.P-I, Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned APG is present along with Deputy Superintendent of Central Prison-I, Sukkur, who submits that judgment of this Court has been challenged by petitioner Dilbar Dahar, before Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan, through Jail petition No. 330 of 2024, which is pending. After such statement counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition and submits that petitioner will agitate his grievance before Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan. Under instruction, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
